zh.lifeSummary: 當William Waldegrave於1462年出生在英國英格蘭艾可波利時，他的父親Sir Thomas Waldegrave25歲，母親Elizabeth Fray21歲。他和Margery Wentworth至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1527年6月30日在英國英格蘭素福爾可布勒斯享年65歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Waldegrave于1462年出生在英国英格兰艾可波利时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Waldegrave25岁，母亲Elizabeth Fray21岁。他和Margery Wentworth至少有4个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1527年6月30日在英国英格兰素福爾可布勒斯享年65岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗。

nameMeanings.name: Waldegrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Walgrave (Northants), which is recorded as Waldgrave in 1086.

variants.name: Woolgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a late variant of   Waldegrave  .

variants.name: Allgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a variant of   Waldegrave  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Waldegrave was born in 1462, in Borley, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Waldegrave, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Fray, was 21. He had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with Margery Wentworth. He died on 30 June 1527, in Bures, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Waldegrave est né en 1462, à Borley, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Waldegrave, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Fray, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles avec Margery Wentworth. Il est décédé le 30 juin 1527, à Bures, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Waldegrave 1462 in Borley, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Waldegrave 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Fray 21. Er hatte mit Margery Wentworth mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Juni 1527 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Bures, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Waldegrave è nato il nel 1462 nel Borley, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Waldegrave, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Fray, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie con Margery Wentworth. Morì il 30 giugno 1527, nel Bures, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Waldegraveが1462年にイギリスイギリスエセックスボルリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Waldegraveは25歳，母Elizabeth Frayは21歳であった。彼はMargery Wentworthとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1527年6月30日にイギリスイギリススフォルクブレスで65歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクブレス サイント マリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Waldegrave(이)가 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 볼리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Waldegrave(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Fray(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Margery Wentworth(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1527년 6월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Waldegrave nasceu em 1462, em Borley, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Waldegrave, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Fray, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas com Margery Wentworth. Ele faleceu em 30 de junho de 1527, em Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Waldegrave родился в 1462 г. в местности борли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Waldegrave было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Fray, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от Margery Wentworth. Он умер 30 июня 1527 г. в местности буресь, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия.
